name: social-media-research
description: Analyze public sentiment and discussions about cars on social media platforms.

# Social Media Research Skill

Use this skill to collect opinions and sentiment about cars from social media.

Prioritize Indonesian-language social posts and Indonesian automotive communities whenever available.

## Sources

Possible platforms:

- X (Twitter)
- Facebook groups
- Instagram comments
- TikTok discussions
- automotive community pages

## What to Extract

Look for:

- variant-specific praise or complaints
- common complaints
- praise from owners
- viral issues
- public sentiment
- trending discussions
- real-world fuel economy
- comfort, NVH, and suspension comments
- ADAS impressions
- spare-part or service complaints
- hill-climb and power complaints

When possible, capture:

- source link
- platform
- variant
- whether the speaker is an owner, shopper, or reviewer
- any useful context such as city, mileage, or ownership duration

## Goal

Identify real-world public perception of a vehicle and surface related information that materially improves the review.
